description: Landing page for ClawCon Bogota tabletop gaming convention.

features.name: hero_section
features.title: Hero Section
features.description: Full-viewport hero with event name (ClawCon Bogota), tagline, date (August 16-17 2026), location (Bogota, Colombia), and a primary CTA button (Register Now).
acceptance: Renders event name as the main heading
CTA button is accessible and keyboard-navigable
Uses design tokens for all colors and spacing

features.name: Deploy to Vercel
features.verification: vercel --prod returns a live https:// URL; URL reported to user
